scene: Clean white background. The Owner, a round-headed stick everyman, stands proudly beside his simple car with one mitt hand resting on the hood and a content smile, holding a car key in the other hand. Selective pop color: the blue car. No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols.

Clean white background. A close view of a single car seat with little wavy warmth lines, and a big closed padlock clamped onto it. Selective pop color: the red padlock. No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols.

Clean white background. A cutaway cross-section of the same car seat revealing the heating coils, wires, and a little control button already built inside it, all present and connected. Selective pop color: the warm orange heating coils. No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols.

Clean white background. The Owner sits in the car seat shivering with chattering teeth and a little snowflake over his head, the padlock still clamped on the seat, freezing cold. Selective pop color: the icy blue snowflake. No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols.

Clean white background. The small green Trick gremlin with pointy ears and a sly grin stands by the car seat holding out one hand palm-up, while a coin slot is bolted onto the seat. Selective pop color: the green gremlin and green coins. No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols.

Clean white background. The Owner reluctantly drops a coin into the seat's coin slot and the seat finally glows warm with wavy heat lines, the padlock popping open just for the moment. Selective pop color: the warm glow and the green coin. No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols.

Clean white background. The green Trick gremlin grins slyly and gestures toward an old glowing classic light bulb beside him, hinting at a much older secret, with cobwebs around the bulb to signal it is from long ago. Selective pop color: the warm bulb-yellow glow. No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols.
